title: JC's decoration
description: JC's Decoration adds stylish furniture and decorative blocks to Minecraft, adding creativity and build personalization.
body:
JC's Decoration is a Minecraft mod that enhances your building experience by adding a variety of decorative furniture and functional items, including tables, countertops, and cabinets. These additions allow players to create more realistic and personalized interiors with modern and stylish designs.

Key features include:

Tables in various styles for both functional and decorative purposes.

Countertops that match the theme of your kitchen or workspace.

Cabinets for organizing and beautifying your spaces.

Tables in various styles for both functional and decorative purposes.
Countertops that match the theme of your kitchen or workspace.
Cabinets for organizing and beautifying your spaces.
A variety of other decorative blocks and items for interior customization.
Perfect for players who love building and decorating, JC's Decoration brings new depth and creativity to your Minecraft world.
